channel.title: Ibm-Granite on TinyWeights.dev
channel.description: Recent content in Ibm-Granite on TinyWeights.dev

item.title: Run IBM Granite 4.1 Locally: 3B, 8B, and 30B Setup Guide
item.description: How to run IBM Granite 4.1 locally with Ollama or llama.cpp. Full setup guide covering the 3B, 8B, and 30B models, hardware requirements, benchmark scores, and tool-calling.
